key_learnings: Pre- and post-workout nutrition significantly affects performance and recovery time.
research_findings: Carbohydrate timing around exercise sessions improves glycogen resynthesis by up to 40%.
current_focus_areas: Synchronizing dietary recommendations with user workout logs and fitness tracker data.

copilot_assigned_topic: Pre- and post-workout nutrition timing for recovery
library_bot_note: This bot's name and purpose have not changed. It was designated as a library bot (Bots 1–19) available for departments to access once starrm1 grants approval and issues an access number.
knowledge_accuracy_requirement: All knowledge retained and shared by this bot must be backed by true, accurate, and factual information. Unverified or speculative content is not permitted.
